class.name: OpenTelemetry
class.brief_description: Main OpenTelemetry API for traces, metrics, and logs export via OTLP.
class.description: OpenTelemetry provides a complete implementation of the OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP) for Godot Engine. It supports distributed tracing with spans, metrics collection (counters, gauges, histograms), and structured logging. Data is exported via HTTP/JSON to OTLP collectors. Key features include multi-sink support for redundant export, automatic batching, UUID v7 trace IDs, and comprehensive span lifecycle management.

method.name: add_event
method.description: Records a named event on span [param span_uuid] with optional [param attributes] and [param timestamp] (0 = now).

method.name: add_sink
method.description: Registers an OTLP/HTTP export sink; returns the sink name.

method.name: create_counter
method.description: Creates a monotonic counter instrument and returns its ID.

method.name: create_gauge
method.description: Creates a gauge instrument and returns its ID.

method.name: create_histogram
method.description: Creates a histogram instrument and returns its ID.

method.name: end_span
method.description: Ends the span identified by [param span_uuid] and queues it for export.

method.name: flush_all
method.description: Flushes all pending spans, metrics, and logs to every registered sink.

method.name: generate_uuid_v7
method.description: Returns a new UUID v7 string.

method.name: get_document
method.description: Returns the [OTelDocument] used for payload serialization.

method.name: get_sink
method.description: Returns the configuration Dictionary for the sink named [param sink_name].

method.name: get_state
method.description: Returns the current [OTelState] accumulator.

method.name: increment_counter
method.description: Increments counter [param counter_id] by [param value].

method.name: init_tracer_provider
method.description: Initializes the tracer provider for the named service and OTLP host; returns the provider ID.

method.name: list_sinks
method.description: Returns an Array of registered sink name strings.

method.name: log_message
method.description: Emits a log record with the given [param level] and [param message].

method.name: record_error
method.description: Records an error string as an event on span [param span_uuid].

method.name: record_exception
method.description: Records an exception event on span [param span_uuid] with optional [param attributes].

method.name: record_histogram
method.description: Records a single observation [param value] to histogram [param histogram_id].

method.name: record_metric
method.description: Records a raw metric data point; prefer the typed helpers (increment_counter etc.).

method.name: remove_sink
method.description: Removes the sink named [param sink_name]; returns the sink name.

method.name: set_attributes
method.description: Merges [param attributes] into the span identified by [param span_uuid].

method.name: set_batch_size
method.description: Sets the maximum number of spans exported in a single batch.

method.name: set_flush_interval
method.description: Sets the automatic flush interval in milliseconds.

method.name: set_gauge
method.description: Sets gauge [param gauge_id] to [param value].

method.name: set_headers
method.description: Sets default HTTP headers sent with every export request; returns a status string.

method.name: set_sink_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables the sink named [param sink_name]; returns the sink name.

method.name: set_status
method.description: Sets the status code and optional description on span [param span_uuid].

method.name: shutdown
method.description: Flushes pending data and shuts down the tracer provider; returns a status string.

method.name: start_span
method.description: Starts a new root span and returns its UUID.

method.name: start_span_with_parent
method.description: Starts a child span under [param parent_span_uuid] and returns its UUID.

method.name: update_name
method.description: Updates the operation name of span [param span_uuid].

constants.constant: Indicates an internal operation within an application.
Indicates a server handling a request.
Indicates a client making a request.
Indicates a producer sending a message.
Indicates a consumer receiving a message.
